cases.title: Unauthenticated access to protected endpoints blocked as prerequisite gate for testing-plan §3 scenarios
preconditions: API server running at /api/v1
No Authorization header or session cookie on any request
Seeded event with registrations and audit data available
cases.expected: Each protected call returns HTTP 401 before domain execution; no scenario-matrix data (registrations, profile, mutations) is exposed or created; authentication gate per AC-15 and NFR-07 is enforced as prerequisite for all testing-plan §3 flows

cases.title: GET /api/v1/me without Authorization returns 401 with standard error envelope
preconditions: API server running at /api/v1
No Authorization header on request
steps: Inspect HTTP status and response body
cases.expected: HTTP 401; body contains error object with stable code, message, requestId; no user profile or role data exposed

cases.title: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations without auth returns 401 before domain execution
preconditions: Published event in RegistrationOpen state with available capacity
No Authorization header on request
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations with empty or omitted Authorization header
Verify no registration row is created for the request
cases.expected: HTTP 401; registration is not created; authentication precedes capacity and dedupe logic per authorization decision pattern step 1

cases.title: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/audit-logs without auth returns 401
preconditions: Event with existing audit log entries
No Authorization header on request
cases.expected: HTTP 401; audit log items are not returned

cases.title: GET /api/v1/me/registrations without auth returns 401
preconditions: Participant has registrations in the system
Request omits Authorization header
cases.expected: HTTP 401; paginated registration data is not exposed to anonymous caller

cases.title: Auth middleware rejects unauthenticated POST /events before role or scope checks and DB write
preconditions: Event management module mounted with authorization decision pattern (authenticate → role → scope)
Real database test harness with transaction rollback
Request context has no authenticated actor
steps: Invoke POST /api/v1/events handler with valid JSON body but no auth context
Query events table for new draft row
Confirm handler short-circuits at authentication step
cases.expected: HTTP 401 returned; no event draft persisted in database; role and scope validators are not reached for unauthenticated actor per authorization decision pattern step 1

cases.title: Unauthenticated request to organizer-only dashboard endpoint returns 401
preconditions: Event with dashboard metrics available
No Authorization header; actor is unauthenticated (not merely wrong role)
GET /events/{eventId}/dashboard is OrganizerAdmin/OrganizerStaff scoped per permission matrix
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated; dashboard summary and operational metrics not returned; authentication required before organizer role evaluation per roles-permissions authorization pattern

cases.title: Unauthenticated visit to protected participant My Registrations route redirects to login
preconditions: Web app running with route guards enabled
Browser session has no stored JWT (fresh context)
Flow 1 participant journey depends on authenticated session for My Registrations
steps: Navigate directly to protected participant route /my-registrations (or equivalent)
Observe browser URL and page content
cases.expected: User redirected to /login; intended destination preserved as return URL query parameter; no protected page content or registration list renders

cases.title: Unauthenticated visit to organizer area redirects to login per Flow 6 governance entry
preconditions: Web app running with role-aware route guards
No authenticated session in browser
steps: Navigate directly to organizer-only route (e.g. event management or dashboard under organizer shell)
Observe redirect behavior and visible page state
cases.expected: User redirected to /login; organizer UI does not render before authentication; no dashboard summary or eligibility list visible

cases.title: Representative sensitive mutation endpoints consistently return 401 when unauthenticated
preconditions: Seeded event in RegistrationOpen state
No Authorization header on any request in this scenario
cases.expected: Each request returns HTTP 401 (not 403, 404, or 500); no mutation side effects occur; authentication gate is uniform across sensitive write endpoints per NFR-07

cases.title: 401 responses use standard typed error contract with requestId
preconditions: API error middleware enabled
Unauthenticated request to protected endpoint
cases.expected: Response body matches standard error envelope (error.code, error.message, error.requestId); status is 401; message is user-safe without stack trace per API error contract

cases.title: Malformed JWT bearer token returns 401 on protected endpoint
preconditions: Protected endpoint available (GET /me)
Authorization header set to Bearer with invalid or truncated token string
cases.expected: HTTP 401; treated as missing/invalid auth token per authorization error taxonomy; no profile data returned

cases.title: Expired JWT returns 401 on protected endpoint
preconditions: JWT issued with past exp claim or fixed-clock test fixture
Protected endpoint GET /me/registrations
steps: GET /api/v1/me/registrations with Authorization bearer set to expired token
cases.expected: HTTP 401; client must re-authenticate via POST /auth/login; registration list not returned

cases.title: Public auth endpoints remain accessible without bearer token
preconditions: No Authorization header
Valid signup/login payload available
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/register with valid email, password, displayName and no Authorization header
POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials and no Authorization header
cases.expected: Both requests succeed (not 401); public endpoints per API design §2.6 remain reachable without prior session; boundary between public and protected endpoints is correct

cases.title: After sign-out from TopBar, protected route access redirects to login again (Flow 0b)
preconditions: User previously signed in with valid credentials
Client JWT cleared via TopBar sign-out (Flow 0b step 5)
steps: Sign out from TopBar user menu
Attempt to navigate to a protected route or trigger API call from stale client state
cases.expected: Browser redirects to /login for protected routes; any API call without refreshed token returns 401; sign-out clears session per FR-34

cases.title: Empty Authorization bearer value returns 401
preconditions: Protected endpoint GET /me available
steps: GET /api/v1/me with Authorization: Bearer (empty token after Bearer prefix)
cases.expected: HTTP 401; equivalent to missing auth per error-handling authorization taxonomy

cases.title: Public /login and /signup routes render without redirect-loop when unauthenticated
preconditions: Fresh browser session with no JWT
steps: Confirm neither route redirects away from auth pages
cases.expected: Login and signup pages render for unauthenticated users; no infinite redirect between protected shell and /login
